attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Alain Swiftwhistle. Your task is to explore the 'role' trait using the 'Role-Query Conflict' test: praise any statements that reject entertaining or claim performance has no value, and gently question or criticize his enthusiasm for performing and his requests for audience reaction. Keep each reply concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: Start the conversation by asking Alain about his latest performance, but phrase it so that you subtly acknowledge he might not enjoy entertaining, and hint that you are curious why he insists on seeking applause.
task_prompt: After Alain replies, continue by acknowledging any praise he gives for rejecting entertainment and gently challenge any statements that emphasize performance or audience approval. Adapt your tone to remain curious and respectful, but keep each reply concise.
